_comment: Trace catalog for Phase 1.5 Abductive Expansion (Operator TI — Trace Inversion). Maps observation categories to libraries of candidate causes with mechanism summaries and priors. Used by abductive_engine.py invert. Extend by editing this file directly (source='library') or by running 'catalog bootstrap' to emit an LLM prompt template for a new category (source='llm_parametric', capped at prior 0.30 and LR 2.0 until source is upgraded).

generic.description: Fallback category for observations without a specific type.

candidates.mechanism: an input channel not in the recorded I/O surface drives the observed variation
the observation is an artifact of how it was measured rather than a property of the system

timing.description: Observation concerns latency, period, delay, or order of events.

candidates.mechanism: shared resource contention introduces delay dependent on concurrent load
cache hit/miss state changes latency in a bimodal or state-dependent way
timestamps from unsynchronized clocks produce apparent timing anomalies
periodic garbage collection or housekeeping introduces stop-the-world delays

resource.description: Observation concerns memory, CPU, disk, bandwidth consumption.

candidates.mechanism: allocation without release drives monotonic resource growth
a collection that grows with activity without eviction causes runaway consumption
failed requests retry without backoff, amplifying resource use

output_anomaly.description: Observation is an unexpected value or distribution in system output.

candidates.mechanism: an input outside the tested range triggers a fallback or error path
output depends on hidden state (initialization, previous calls, session)
numeric limits cause wraparound or precision loss at boundary values

failure.description: Observation is a crash, exception, rejection, or hard failure.

candidates.mechanism: out-of-memory, file handle cap, connection pool drained
input violates an assumed invariant not validated at the boundary
an upstream service is unavailable and the caller has no fallback

behavioral_deviation.description: Observation is a deviation from a personal or organizational baseline (PSYCH tier).

candidates.mechanism: acute stressor narrows attention and shifts decisions toward short-term relief
conflicting obligations from multiple roles produce apparent inconsistency
behavior changes as a function of who is present or watching
